_comment: OrigamDataTable component tokens — Lot 5A. DataTable with sub-components: header, headers, row, rows, column, footer, group-header-row. BEM children: cell, sort-icon, sort-badge, column-title, column-value.

width.$description: Table takes full width of its container

border-spacing.$description: No spacing between cells (pairs with border-collapse separate)

loading._comment: Tokens for the --loading state on the root DataTable wrapper.

opacity.$description: Opacity applied to data cells while loading

header._comment: BEM block: .origam-data-table-header-cell — th elements in the header row.

background-color.$description: Header cell background — neutral.0 light / neutral.900 dark. Provides visual separation from body rows.

color.$description: Header cell text color (white on dark header background)

font-weight.$description: Slightly heavier weight for column titles

font-size.$description: Header cell font-size (smaller than body cells)

border-bottom-color.$description: Bottom border separating header from body

border-bottom-width.$description: Width of the header bottom border

border-bottom-style.$description: Style of the header bottom border

color.$description: Sort icon default color (matches header text)

color-active.$description: Sort icon color when actively sorting

opacity.$description: Hidden at rest, revealed on hover/sorted state

opacity-active.$description: Fully visible when column is actively sorted

background-color.$description: Sort badge background — translucent layer on header background. NOTE: was rgba(255,255,255,0.12) — replaced by border.default which is semantically neutral-400 light / neutral-700 dark.

font-size.$description: Sort badge font-size (14px literal — no exact primitive alias)

padding.$description: Inner padding of the sort badge

min-width.$description: Minimum width to keep badge circular

min-height.$description: Minimum height to keep badge circular

row._comment: BEM block: .origam-data-table-row — tr elements in tbody

hover-background-color.$description: Row background on hover — surface.overlay = neutral.100 light / neutral.800 dark. Tile-style overlay pattern, no JS needed.

selected-background-color.$description: Row background when selected. Arbitrage: uses surface.overlay (neutral.100 light). Token action.primary.bgSubtle absent du semantic. Decision requise : créer color.action.primary.bgSubtle = primary.50 pour distinguer visuellement sélection vs hover.

striped-background-color.$description: Alternate (even) row background for striped variant. Arbitrage: surface.sunken (neutral.50 light / neutral.950 dark) retenu — sémantiquement 'en creux' par rapport à surface.default. surface.disabled (neutral.200) serait trop marqué.

border-bottom-color.$description: Row bottom border color (separator between rows)

border-bottom-width.$description: Width of the row bottom border

border-bottom-style.$description: Style of the row bottom border

column-title._comment: BEM element: .origam-data-table-row__column-title — mobile layout column label

font-weight.$description: Label weight in mobile stacked layout

column-min-height.$description: Minimum height of each stacked cell in mobile layout (52px literal — aligns with standard touch target size)

background-color.$description: Background for fixed (sticky) columns. NOTE: was rgba(33,33,33,1) hardcoded. Replaced by surface.raised to support theming.

z-index.$description: Stack order for fixed columns (above scrolling body)

border-right-color.$description: Right border of the last fixed column. NOTE: was rgba(255,255,255,0.12) hardcoded — now border.subtle for proper light/dark support.

border-right-width.$description: Width of the separator after the last fixed column

background-color.$description: Footer background — inherits from table surface

padding-block.$description: Block (top/bottom) padding of the footer bar

padding-inline.$description: Inline (left/right) padding of the footer bar

border-top-color.$description: Top border separating footer from last data row

border-top-width.$description: Width of the footer top border

border-top-style.$description: Style of the footer top border

align-items.$description: Vertical alignment for footer flex children

flex-wrap.$description: Allows footer to wrap on small screens

justify-content.$description: Footer children align to the right

gap.$description: Gap between label and select in items-per-page

select-width.$description: Fixed width for the items-per-page select

min-width.$description: Min width to prevent layout shift

padding-inline.$description: Horizontal padding of the info block

margin-inline-start.$description: Left margin to separate pagination from info

group-header-row._comment: BEM block: .origam-data-table-group-header-row — tr element for group headers

background-color.$description: Group header row background — surface.overlay (neutral.100) creates visual distinction from data rows without heavy contrast

font-weight.$description: Group name slightly heavier to signal grouping

padding-inline-start-factor.$description: Multiplied by group depth to indent nested groups. calc(depth * 16px) in runtime CSS.

color.$description: Text color for the empty state message — secondary to de-emphasize
Text color for the loading message row

cursor.$description: Pointer cursor on sortable column headers

icon-color.$description: Sort icon color on sortable header columns

icon-color-hover.$description: Sort icon color on header hover (opacity-based reveal)

icon-color-active.$description: Sort icon color when column is actively sorted
